package rulecoverage

func PositiveHttpBodyReadallWithoutLimitreader() string {
    ruleID := "http_body_readall_without_limitreader"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`io.ReadAll(req.Body)` in HTTP handlers without `io.LimitReader`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
